data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 85,000 USDT with a 0.85% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 18, 2025, 01:14 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 85,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 85,012.359375 USDT, with a narrowed 0.85% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: a16z Crypto Invests $55 Million in LayerZero Tokens
data.description: According to Odaily, a16z Crypto partner Ali Yahya announced on X that the firm has invested an additional $55 million in LayerZero tokens (ZRO), with a lock-up period of three years. Yahya noted that the global financial system is evolving and expressed enthusiasm about the LayerZero protocol's role in enabling new businesses and complex processes to transition onto the blockchain. He emphasized that this information does not constitute investment advice or an advertisement for investment services.

data.title: EigenLayer: Slashing mechanism is now live on the mainnet
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Ethereum re-staking protocol EigenLayer published a post on X platform stating that its slashing mechanism has been launched on the mainnet and the protocol committee has completed the upgrade execution. 
Subsequently, node operators and stakers using EigenPod CLI must upgrade to perform checkpoints; AVSs can now directly integrate penalty conditions into services on the mainnet.

data.title: Blur officially transferred 23.8 million tokens unlocked this month to Coinbase Prime, worth $2.3 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, Blur, which is unlocked once a month, transferred 23.8 million BLUR (US$2.3 million) unlocked this month to Coinbase Prime 1 hour ago. 
Since entering the unlocking cycle in June 2023, 35.6% of the total BLUR (1.068 billion) has been unlocked and transferred to Coinbase Prime to enter the market circulation. Calculated at the price when unlocked and transferred out, it is worth US$340 million, with an average transfer price of US$0.318, while the current price of BLUR is only US$0.096.

data.title: CZ: BNB is a meme coin
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CZ quoted the news that BNB will be listed on Kraken and said: "BNB is a meme coin." 
According to previous news, BNB will be listed on Kraken on April 22, and deposits are now open.

data.title: Fidelity FBTC Sees Significant Inflow of $25.9 Million
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Farside Investors reported a net inflow of $25.9 million into Fidelity FBTC yesterday. This substantial movement highlights increased investor interest and activity in the fund.

data.title: Ethereum's EigenLayer Implements Slashing Mechanism on Mainnet
data.description: According to Foresight News, Ethereum's re-staking protocol EigenLayer has announced the activation of its slashing mechanism on the mainnet. The protocol's committee has successfully completed the upgrade execution, marking a significant development in its operational framework.

data.title: The former SEC chairman will serve as the interim U.S. attorney for the Southern District of New York, and the appointment was accused by Democrats of conspiracy
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to what US President Trump posted on Truth Social on Wednesday, New York Senator and Democratic Minority Leader Chuck Schumer blocked Jay Clayton's nomination, causing Clayton to currently serve in a temporary position, so the former chairman of the US SEC will have to wait longer to officially become the federal prosecutor of the Southern District of New York (SDNY). Because the federal trial court of the Southern District of New York (SDNY) often hears major corporate criminal cases, the position of federal prosecutor has attracted much attention. Clayton said in an interview with CNBC in 2021: "I am very optimistic about this technology." Some cryptocurrency experts praised him for being more open-minded than his successor Gary Gensler. 
However, Clayton lacks prosecutorial experience, and Schumer claimed that the only reason Trump nominated the former regulator to this important position was to advance the president's sinister conspiracy to eventually pursue and prosecute his political opponents. Trump hit back on Truth Social, praising Clayton's qualifications and experience and accusing Schumer of engaging in partisan politics. (Bitcoin.com)

data.title: Alameda Research transfers $9.5 million to Wintermute address
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, Alameda Research transferred about 9.5 million USDT to Wintermute address OTC within 10 hours, which may be transferred to Binance and Coinbase. In addition, they also transferred 129,871 USDT to a wallet that may belong to B2C2.

data.title: Wintermute announces investment in lending protocol Euler Finance
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Well-known market maker Wintermute announced in a post on X that its investment institution Wintermute Ventures has invested in DeFi lending agreement Euler Finance, and the specific amount has not been disclosed.
